offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed approvals cause cash flow gaps. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking of invoices and reminders via email.
problem: Delayed invoice approvals leading to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on invoice workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing construction tools
try_it: Let users try manual invoice entry and reminder notifications
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video of manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
